name.ja: <ruby>破<rt>は</rt></ruby><ruby>械<rt>かい</rt></ruby><ruby>式<rt>し</rt></ruby><ruby>鬼<rt>き</rt></ruby>シュマ

text.en: If this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Unchained" monster from your Deck, except "Unchained Ogre Shma", then destroy 1 card you control, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Fiend monsters. If this card on the field is destroyed by card effect, except "Unchained Ogre Shma", or by battle: You can Special Summon 1 "Unchained" monster from your hand or Deck, except "Unchained Ogre Shma". You can only use each effect of "Unchained Ogre Shma" once per turn.
text.zh-CN: 此卡名的①②效果1回合仅可各使用1次。①：此卡召唤的情况下可以发动。从牌组将“破械式鬼 修摩”以外的、1只等级4以下的“破械”怪兽特殊召唤。然后，将自己场上的1张卡破坏。此回合，自己仅可特殊召唤恶魔族怪兽。②：场上的此卡因战斗或“破械式鬼 修摩”以外的卡的效果被破坏的情况下可以发动。从手牌・牌组将“破械式鬼 修摩”以外的1只“破械”怪兽特殊召唤。
